description: CompositionBurgundy coloured V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with gathers at the neckFittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Get rocking in this solid burgundy tee from the Power Puff range of jealous 21. The V-neckline and the gathers add a touch of feminity. Team these with skinny jeans, gladiator heels and stacked bangles for a really trendy look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
